title: capsicum indicum var. angulosum
intro: Capsicum indicum var. angulosum, also known as the Thai bird's eye chili, is a variety of chili pepper plant that belongs to the Capsicum family. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Capsicum indicum var. angulosum include reducing pain and inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include making it into a tea, powder, or oil, which can be used to treat various ailments, such as arthritis and colds.
